The insurance policy is 5/10, meaning it covers up to $5,000 per person and $10,000 total per accident. Leon Taylor’s medical expenses are $6,251, but the per-person limit caps payment at $5,000 for him. John Martin’s $75 is within the per-person limit, and the total of $5,075 is under the $10,000 aggregate, so the company pays $5,075.  

\boxed{G}
